PreceptDef.label: preponderance of evidence
PreceptDef.description: A balanced, pragmatic approach to order. If the likelihood of wrongdoing outweighs innocence by even a hair, the colony must act to safeguard the collective stability.

PreceptDef.label: beyond reasonable doubt
PreceptDef.description: Every soul is innocent until the dark shadow of absolute certainty falls. We believe it is infinitely better to let a dozen guilty scoundrels walk free than to mistakenly condemn a single innocent comrade.

PreceptDef.label: presumption of guilt
PreceptDef.description: Accusation is itself the first proof of disharmony. If a soul has been brought before the court, they have already disrupted the peace; the weight lies solely on them to scrub away the stain of suspicion.
